use_cases: Displaying premium subscription tier details with pricing and features
Showcasing elite membership benefits in a SaaS pricing table
Presenting high-tier service offerings to potential customers
Comparing subscription plans with visual hierarchy emphasis on premium option
Converting users to higher-tier subscriptions through compelling card design
ai_summary: A premium pricing card component designed for displaying elite subscription plan details, typically featuring gradient accents, feature lists, and call-to-action buttons. Built as a composite component using Radix UI primitives and Tailwind CSS for consistent styling and accessibility.
